outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran says deal still 'far off' as Hormuz remains closed and ceasefire deadline looms
outlets.summary: CNN live coverage of Ghalibaf's televised address declaring deal 'far off,' Khatibzadeh rejecting talks timeline at Antalya, and IDF confirming first strikes on Hezbollah since ceasefire. Ceasefire expires April 22.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Gasoline prices could drop following crude oil drop — but Hormuz reversal complicates
outlets.summary: NPR analyzes potential gas price relief after oil's brief plunge on Hormuz opening, complicated by Iran's same-day reversal. EIA projects gas peak $4.30 in April.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Gen. Keane warns Iran 'overplayed their hand' as US Hormuz blockade continues
outlets.summary: Fox features Gen. Jack Keane analysis that Iran has 'overplayed their hand' by re-closing Hormuz. Says US blockade is working and Iran's military is degraded. Sanctions waiver expiration tightens economic pressure.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Macron says French soldier killed, 3 wounded in attack on peacekeepers in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Washington Times covers killing of French UNIFIL SGM Montorio at Ghandouriyeh. Macron blames Hezbollah.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran says deal still 'far off' as Hormuz Strait remains shut
outlets.summary: Euronews covers Ghalibaf's statement that deal is 'far off,' Khatibzadeh rejecting talks timeline, and European defensive naval mission planning. UK-France Hormuz summit with 40+ nations.

outlets.name: PBS News
outlets.headline: French soldier killed in attack on U.N. peacekeepers in Lebanon
outlets.summary: PBS covers UNIFIL ambush at Ghandouriyeh. SGM Montorio killed, 3 wounded. France demands arrests. Second European military death in war.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF strikes Hezbollah operatives in first strikes since Lebanon ceasefire
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post reports IDF confirmed first strikes on Hezbollah since ceasefire — tunnel shaft destroyed, weapons cache found. Hezbollah contacted Iran about violations. Demolitions continue in Bint Jbeil.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF drone strike kills one in south Lebanon on first day of truce
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports IDF drone killed Hezbollah anti-tank missile operator in ceasefire violation. Netanyahu 'not finished' with Hezbollah.

outlets.name: ANI / Press TV
outlets.headline: Ghalibaf says 'all enemy plans failed, including Strait of Hormuz opening'
outlets.summary: ANI/Press TV cover Ghalibaf's April 19 televised address claiming all enemy plans failed. Says deal 'far off,' denied Trump's 7 claims. Iran sanctions waiver expired — frames as vindication of resistance strategy.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: IRGC fires at Indian vessel in Hormuz as Iran tightens strait control
outlets.summary: Iran International covers IRGC firing on Indian ship. Mojtaba Khamenei Army Day message: drones 'strike like lightning.' Navy ready for 'new bitter defeats.'
